title.rendered: Digital Marketing Courses in Ranchi with Guaranteed Placement (2024)

content.rendered:
If you are searching for digital marketing course in Ranchi, This blog will give all the information that you need to know before joining digital marketing institute in Ranchi.

I am writing this blog after my own experience of researching 25+ institute to find best digital marketing course in Ranchi.

It took my 1 entire month to research about digital marketing course in Ranchi. So now you don’t have to struggle to find best digital marketing institute in Ranchi.

Before I share list of best digital marketing course in Ranchi with placement you must know on what criteria you can judge if digital marketing institute is good or not.

How to find digital marketing course in Ranchi

Digital marketing is most demanded skill. So learning digital marketing can be best decision of your life. Finding good digital marketing institute in difficult.

Every institute will claim i am the best. If you will check following things you will find best digital marketing institute.

How Long Digital Marketing Institute Is In Training?

Every year many digital marketing institute in Ranchi opens but fails to deliver quality and meet industry standards so many of them shut down within a year or within 2 year.

If a digital marketing course in Ranchi is running for 4 to 5 year it’s obvious digital marketing institute in credible.

Digital Marketing Course In Ranchi Reviews?

Google reviews are best way to check if a digital marketing course in Ranchi is good or not.

But before you read reviews keep in mind if an institute has only positive reviews that means all reviews are fake.

Think of your self if you have 1000s of students how all can be satisfied?

When you were in school or college every student in the school or college were satisfied? no offcourse not.

This is red flag if a digital marketing institute has only positive reviews never join them they are not ethical.

Digital Marketing Course In Ranchi Own Marketing

If digital marketing institute in Ranchi is not able to do their own marketing how they can teach you?

Just google digital marketing course in Ranchi if you see the institute website in first page you can think of joining them.

But if they are not in first page this means they them self don’t know SEO. So joining such institute will be waste of your time.

Who Is Your Trainer in Digital Marketing Institute in Ranchi?

At the end it’s trainer who will teach you. Ask institute about trainer experience in digital marketing industry.

Many institute have trainers who them self have not work any many digital marketing project they joined a course and after the course they started training other students.

Such digital marketing institute in Ranchi is complete scam. Digital marketing is not history where you need to memorise and explain.

Trainer must have at-least 4-6 year experience of running digital marketing campaigns. Than only he can get value from his teaching

With above questions you can find best digital marketing course for you in Ranchi. Here is my list based on my research.

Kalam Academy Ranchi

Kalam Academy Ranchi is first digital marketing institute in Ranchi. They are not just institute they have digital marketing agency also.

Kalam Academy Ranchi is in digital marketing training in Ranchi from more than 5 years. It was founded in 2019.

Kalam Academy is also recognised by Google in their list of 100 promising startup in 2023.

Started with just 2 student now they train 500+ students in a year.

They offer FREE Counselling before you join their digital marketing program in Ranchi.

  • Course Name – Advance Digital Marketing Course
  • Course duration– 3 Months+ 2 Months (Optional internship)
  • Mode– Offline In Ranchi
  • Scholarship– Yes / special scholarship for girls

They also provide their own mobile app with life time free access of recorded lecture of digital marketing course.

IIM Skill

IIM Skill is one of the Online Digital Marketing courses in Ranchi offering a quality curriculum along with several other advantages of the benefit of enrolling in the Institute.

The Digital Marketing course is of 9 months duration. It is a project-focused learning module with 100% practical training. There are ample options for placement opportunities and there are online classroom batches.

Website

IIDE – The Digital School

IIDE is a digital marketing agency and an institute assisting businesses in the early stages and focusing on various digital marketing concepts.

They offer a 3-month digital marketing course covering all in-demand concepts of digital marketing that need to be job-oriented.

They are Mumbai Based and offer online courses.

Contact Details

Phone Number: +91 7890149401
Email ID: admin@w3webschool.com
Address: 214/1, 2nd Floor, Dum Dum Rd, near Dumdum Phari, Ghoshpara, Kolkata – 700074, India

W3Web School

W3web School provides comprehensive digital marketing courses placement assistance, designed to enhance your career in a few months. Upgrade your skills with this digital marketing institute in Rajkot and find out if digital marketing is right for you at demo session.

W3web School offers a digital marketing course in Rajkot and hands-on practical training. Ideal for freshers, HR executives, and non-technical professionals, this course includes real-time experience on 30+ tools, resume and LinkedIn profile assistance, 5+ client-based live projects, and lifetime access to self-paced learning.

Conclusion Digital Marketing Course In Ranchi

Hope this blog have given you a clear insight about digital marketing course in Ranchi.

It took me 2 month of research and 100+ calls to different institute in Ranchi to understand digital marketing opportunity in Ranchi. 

Please share this blog with your friend on whatsapp and facebook and linkedin. This will encourage me alot to do more.

If you are looking for offline course in Ranchi Kalam Academy is best option.

Still not satisfied? Search for digital marketing course in ranchi in Google
